description: Mechanical seal leakage — excessive dripping or spray from seal housing
root_causes: Dry running, thermal shock, misalignment, incorrect seal face material, shaft runout > 0.05mm

description: Bearing failure — noise, vibration, overheating at bearing housing
root_causes: Fatigue spalling, inadequate lubrication, contaminated grease, misalignment, overloading

description: Impeller erosion/cavitation wear — reduced head and flow, vibration
root_causes: Cavitation (low NPSH), abrasive particles in fluid, chemical attack, vane tip recirculation

description: Pump cavitation — rumbling noise, flow fluctuation, impeller damage
root_causes: Insufficient NPSH available, suction strainer blockage, high fluid temperature, excessive suction losses

description: Heat exchanger tube fouling — reduced heat transfer, increased pressure drop
root_causes: Scaling (CaCO3/CaSO4), biological growth, particulate deposition, corrosion product accumulation

description: Heat exchanger tube leak — product contamination, pressure loss
root_causes: Erosion-corrosion, tube vibration fatigue, pitting corrosion, stress corrosion cracking

description: Control valve sticking/seizure — erratic control, hunting
root_causes: Packing friction, stem corrosion, process deposits, actuator diaphragm failure, positioner drift

description: Electric motor overheating — high winding temperature alarm/trip
root_causes: Overloading, voltage imbalance >2%, blocked ventilation, high ambient temperature, single phasing

description: Internal corrosion — wall thinning, pitting, metal loss
root_causes: CO2 corrosion, H2S corrosion, under-deposit corrosion, microbiologically influenced corrosion (MIC)

description: Excessive vibration due to misalignment — 2x RPM dominant
root_causes: Angular misalignment, parallel offset, soft foot, foundation settlement, thermal growth

description: Flange gasket leak — visible leak or emission detection
root_causes: Bolt relaxation, thermal cycling, incorrect gasket type, improper bolt torquing sequence

description: Compressor valve failure — increased temperature, reduced capacity
root_causes: Valve plate fatigue, spring failure, liquid carryover, high delta-P across valve, contaminated gas

description: V-belt/coupling wear — noise, slippage, power transmission loss
root_causes: Normal wear, misalignment of sheaves, incorrect belt tension, environmental degradation

description: Instrument calibration drift — inaccurate readings, false alarms
root_causes: Sensor aging, process buildup on sensor, EMI, temperature effects, transmitter electronics failure

description: Internal coating/lining failure — exposure of base metal, accelerated corrosion
root_causes: Chemical attack, abrasion, holiday in original coating, improper surface preparation, exceeded temperature rating

description: Safety valve seat leak — audible leak, pressure drop
root_causes: Seat damage from popping, corrosion, process deposits on seating surface, vibration-induced chatter

description: Motor winding insulation degradation — low megger readings
root_causes: Thermal aging, moisture ingress, voltage spikes, partial discharge, contamination

description: Equipment foundation cracking/settlement — increased vibration baseline
root_causes: Soil settlement, dynamic loading fatigue, chemical attack on concrete, inadequate design for dynamic loads

description: Cooling tower fill degradation — reduced cooling efficiency, increased approach
root_causes: Scaling, biological fouling, UV degradation of PVC fill, mechanical damage from maintenance

description: Boiler tube failure — water/steam leak, forced outage
root_causes: Overheating (departure from nucleate boiling), hydrogen damage, caustic gouging, oxygen pitting, fatigue cracking

description: Diesel generator fail to start — no start on demand
root_causes: Battery failure, fuel system air lock, starter motor failure, control circuit fault, low coolant

description: Transformer oil degradation — high DGA values, reduced BDV
root_causes: Thermal aging, moisture ingress, partial discharge, winding hot spots, cellulose decomposition

description: UPS battery degradation — reduced backup time, cell failure
root_causes: Calendar aging, thermal runaway, sulfation, electrolyte dry-out, cell imbalance

description: RO membrane fouling/degradation — increased rejection rate drop, high TDS in permeate
root_causes: Scaling (silica, CaCO3), biofouling, membrane oxidation by chlorine, colloidal fouling

description: Valve packing leak — visible leak at valve stem
root_causes: Packing wear, stem scoring, thermal cycling, incorrect packing type, over/under tightening

description: Coupling failure — sudden vibration increase, noise, loss of drive
root_causes: Fatigue, misalignment, overloading, elastomer degradation, incorrect coupling selection

description: Lubrication oil degradation — high TAN, low viscosity, water contamination
root_causes: Thermal breakdown, oxidation, water ingress, particle contamination, extended oil change interval

description: Burner flame failure — boiler trip on flame failure
root_causes: Flame scanner fouling, fuel quality change, air/fuel ratio upset, igniter failure, scanner misalignment

description: Level transmitter failure — false high/low level alarms
root_causes: Impulse line blockage, diaphragm failure, electronics failure, process buildup, calibration drift

description: External corrosion under insulation (CUI) — wall loss under insulation
root_causes: Moisture ingress through damaged insulation, operating temperature 60-175°C (CUI susceptible range), chloride in insulation material, damaged vapor barrier
